characters.description: A level-79 Human Bronze Tank whose armor, glaive, and unusual solo-combat record make him a formidable member of Silvi's rescue effort. He extracts two survivors from an ambush but is caught beyond the portal when it closes.
characters.name: Derek Hunt

characters.description: Derek's portal-using acquaintance, coordinating the effort to retrieve an ambushed team. Her limited mana forces her to close the passage before Derek can fully escape.
characters.name: Silvi

characters.description: A surviving member of Silvi's ambushed team. Derek reaches her location and gets her through the rescue portal before it closes.
characters.name: Allie

characters.description: A member of the team Silvi tries to rescue from an ambush. Derek finds that he has already died before the remaining survivors can be extracted.
characters.name: John

characters.description: A member of Silvi's ambushed team. She is already dead when Derek reaches the group during the portal rescue.
characters.name: Andrea

characters.description: An injured survivor of the ambush. Derek carries him to Silvi's portal despite his leg wound and the attackers pressing the rescue party.
characters.name: Gerard

characters.description: A frightened child Derek finds lost in the diseased forest. He speaks an unfamiliar language and cannot understand Derek when they first meet.
characters.name: Thomas

characters.description: Travis and Malorie's daughter, newly able to use the Great System and beginning to learn Leatherworking. She flees a monster attack on her village and is separated from her mother during the escape.
characters.name: Brandi

characters.description: Brandi's mother and one of the adults leading refugees from a destroyed village. She stays behind with Sana and Marshall to delay pursuing wolves while the civilians continue fleeing.
characters.name: Malorie

characters.description: The chief of a village overrun by forest beasts. While civilians flee toward another settlement, he remains with the defenders attempting to hold the gate.
characters.name: Leon

characters.description: Leon's wife and a leader among the civilians escaping their ruined village. When wolves catch the refugees, she remains behind with Malorie and Marshall to buy the others time.
characters.name: Sana

characters.description: An escort helping civilians escape the monster attack. He joins Sana and Malorie in delaying the pursuing wolf pack while the rest of the refugees continue toward safety.
characters.name: Marshall

characters.description: Brandi's father and one of the injured defenders who remains at the village while civilians flee the monster assault.
characters.name: Travis

characters.description: The name Derek gives a massive creature emerging from the rupture opened by Void Call. His belief that it might obey him ends immediately when it attacks.
characters.name: Asher

characters.description: Chief of Thomas's home village, reported to be around level 30.
characters.name: Rayna

characters.description: Thomas's grandfather, Delilah's husband, the village head trader, and one of Rayna's advisers. He helps evaluate Derek's theory that an overflowing undying dungeon is causing the regional blight.
characters.name: Richard

characters.description: Thomas's grandmother and Richard's wife. She is part of the family to which Thomas returns after his ordeal in the forest.
characters.name: Delilah

characters.description: A villager assigned to organize the incoming refugees. Rayna also selects him to help carry a warning about the forest crisis toward Torith.
characters.name: Davis

characters.description: The village innkeeper and bartender. He arranges Derek's lodging and accepts a hide in exchange for accommodations and a modest bar credit.
characters.name: Bart

characters.description: The lost boy Derek escorted home, now identified by his full name. Thomas Stewart has chosen Rogue despite Derek's doubts about the fit, and binds himself through a Great System oath never to disclose Derek's secrets.
characters.name: Thomas Stewart

characters.description: The leader of a high-level House Gracefall party that assaults Rayna's village over valuable hides. He prepares to execute Rayna after she intervenes to protect Brandi and Malorie.
characters.name: Gracefall Noble

characters.description: The novice leatherworker earlier known as Brandi, now identified as Brandi Fields. Derek finds her unconscious after a House Gracefall party attacks her home over valuable hides.
characters.name: Brandi Fields

characters.description: Brandi's mother, now identified as Malorie Fields. She is critically injured during the House Gracefall assault, and Derek stabilizes her with Rejuvenation after returning to the deserted village.
characters.name: Malorie Fields

characters.description: The village chief earlier known as Rayna, now identified as Rayna West. Derek finds her critically wounded and facing execution after she opposed the House Gracefall attackers.
characters.name: Rayna West

characters.description: A level-65 wind wolf and the boss of a level-50 beast dungeon. It traps Derek inside a tornado filled with cutting winds during the party's attempt to complete the dungeon.
characters.name: Canis Cyclonus

characters.description: A lesser Sybil serving House Gracefall. By examining a possession of the missing noble, she determines that he has no future and thereby confirms his death.
characters.name: Maria

characters.description: A high-status adventurer in House Gracefall's service. He receives a one-month assignment to investigate a young noble's death and the quest that led to it.
characters.name: Bronson

characters.description: Derek's portal-using acquaintance, now confirmed as the horned rabbit that travelled with him. Their bond transforms her into a void rabbit with a legendary companion class.
characters.name: Silvi

characters.description: The House Gracefall noble who led the earlier attack on Rayna's village. His full identity is now connected to the man whose death Derek concealed as a casualty of the Undying Dungeon.
characters.name: Wallace Gracefall
